top_signals.title: White House Signals Imminent Deal Announcement with Iran
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg White House Correspondent Jeff Mason and Bloomberg News Reporter Dan Williams join David Gura, Christina Ruffini, and Lisa Mateo on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the White House announcement that a deal with Iran to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz is forthcoming. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump says deal with Iran to reopen Hormuz ‘largely negotiated’
top_signals.summary: US president plans to announce agreement to end war after talks with Gulf leaders and allies
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
